  • Overview
  • Package
  • Class
  • Use
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Help

Uses of Class
jline.solvers.SolverOptions

Packages that use SolverOptions
Package
Description
jline.api
This package contains most algorithms for solving stochastic models
jline.solvers
This package contains the solver superclasses and related data structures
jline.solvers.ctmc
Classes that implement solution approaches based on Continuous-Time Markov Chain solution
jline.solvers.env
Classes that implement solution approaches for stochastic models in random environments
jline.solvers.fluid
Classes that implement solution approaches based on mean-field and fluid approximations
jline.solvers.fluid.analyzers
Classes that embody different fluid ODE analysis algorithms
jline.solvers.fluid.odes
Classes that generate the ordinary differential equations (ODEs) used in the Fluid solver
jline.solvers.jmt
Classes that rely on the Java Modelling Tools (JMT) suite solvers
jline.solvers.ln
Classes that define LINE's Layered Network (LN) solver
jline.solvers.lqns
 
jline.solvers.mam
Classes that analyze networks using matrix-analytic methods
jline.solvers.mva
Classes that analyze networks through Mean-Value Analysis (MVA)
jline.solvers.mva.analyzers
Classes that embody different mean-value analysis methods
jline.solvers.mva.handlers
Classes for coordinate the execution and performance metric estimation in MVA-based algorithms
jline.solvers.nc
Classes that analyze networks using Normalizing Costant (NC) methods
jline.solvers.nc.analyzers
 
jline.solvers.ssa
Classes that analyze networks using Stochastic Simulation Algorithm (SSA)
jline.solvers.taussa
Classes that analyze networks using Tau-Leaping Stochastic Simulation Algorithm (TauSSA)

  • Uses of SolverOptions in jline.api

    Methods in jline.api with parameters of type SolverOptions
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static PFQN.pfqnNcXQReturn
    PFQN.compute_norm_const(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, SolverOptions options)
    Run a normalizing constant solution method in a load-independent model
    static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn
    PFQN.compute_norm_const_ld(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, Matrix mu, SolverOptions options)
    Run a normalizing constant solution method in a load-dependent model
    static Map<Integer,Matrix>
    MAM.mmap_compress(Map<Integer,Matrix> MMAP, SolverOptions config)
    Compress a Marked Markovian Arrival processes.
    static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn
    PFQN.pfqn_gld(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix mu, SolverOptions options)
    Compute the normalizing constant of a single-class load-dependent model
    static PFQN.pfqnNcComplexReturn
    PFQN.pfqn_gld_complex(ComplexMatrix L, Matrix N, Matrix mu, SolverOptions options)
     
    static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn
    PFQN.pfqn_gldsingle(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix mu, SolverOptions options)
    Auxiliary function used by pfqn_gld to computer the normalizing constant in a single-class load-dependent model.
    static PFQN.pfqnNcComplexReturn
    PFQN.pfqn_gldsingle_complex(ComplexMatrix L, Matrix N, Matrix mu, SolverOptions options)
     
    static PFQN.pfqnNcXQReturn
    PFQN.pfqn_nc(Matrix lambda, Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, SolverOptions options)
    Main method to compute the normalizing constant of a load-independent model
    static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn
    PFQN.pfqn_ncld(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, Matrix mu, SolverOptions options)
    Main method to compute the normalizing constant of a load-dependent model
    static double
    PFQN.pfqn_nrl(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, Matrix alpha, SolverOptions options)
     
    static double
    PFQN.pfqn_nrp(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, Matrix alpha, SolverOptions options)
     
    static PFQN.pfqnNcReturn
    PFQN.pfqn_panacea(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, SolverOptions options)
    Compute the PANACEA approximation
    static PFQN.pfqnRdReturn
    PFQN.pfqn_rd(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, Matrix mu, SolverOptions options)
     
    static double
    PFQN.pfqn_xia(Matrix L, int N, Matrix s, SolverOptions options)
